name: ragkeep
description: --- language: - de tags: - books - rag - text-retrieval license: MIT pretty_name: ragkeep-weimarer-klassik-books-de configs: - default ---
author: Michael Schmidt

scripts.build:pages: npm run build:registry && sh -c 'f=../ragrun/.env; [ -f "$f" ] || f=../.env; [ -f "$f" ] || { echo "ragkeep: ragrun .env not found (tried ../ragrun/.env and ../.env)" >&2; exit 1; }; exec node --env-file "$f" --import tsx ./scripts/build_static_site.ts'
scripts.build:registry: sh -c 'f=../ragrun/.env; [ -f "$f" ] || f=../.env; [ -f "$f" ] || { echo "ragkeep: ragrun .env not found (tried ../ragrun/.env and ../.env)" >&2; exit 1; }; exec node --env-file "$f" --import tsx ./scripts/build_agent_registry.ts'
scripts.dev: RAGRUN_URL=http://localhost:8000 npm run build:pages && npm run serve
